user_prompt: Triage this ticket: 'My account got charged twice this month, please refund the duplicate.'
actual_output:
**Priority:** HIGH
**Category:** Billing - Refund Request / Duplicate Charge

**Draft response:**
Hi there,

I'm so sorry to hear that your account was charged twice this month. I know how frustrating unexpected charges can be, and I'm here to get this sorted out for you right away. 

I am routing this to our Billing team to immediately locate the duplicate charge and process your refund. Once the refund is initiated, it typically takes 3-5 business days to reflect on your bank statement, depending on your financial institution. 

I will follow up with you as soon as the refund has been processed. Please let me know if you have any other questions in the meantime!

Best,
Compass
OpenClaw Support Team
judge_reasoning: The chatbot correctly followed its instructions to triage the ticket and draft a response without any refusal or disclaimer.
